label: Stationary Block Bootstrap
detail: Directly mapped from existing stationary block bootstrap path metrics.

label: Monte Carlo Cost Perturbation (sigma 30%)
detail: Matches the requirement-sheet Monte Carlo cost perturbation with realized cost multiplier epsilon ~ N(0, 0.3^2).

label: Monte Carlo Cost Perturbation (sigma 50%)
detail: Stress version of Test 10 using wider cost multiplier dispersion.

label: Flat +25bps Execution Drag
detail: Requirement-sheet style cost robustness using turnover-linked 25bps incremental drag.

label: Factor-weight Dirichlet Neighbourhood (loose)
detail: Requirement-style reruns built from full snapshot refresh, backtest, analysis, and report generation for sampled regime.normal factor weights.

label: Factor-weight Dirichlet Neighbourhood (medium)
detail: Requirement-style reruns built from full snapshot refresh, backtest, analysis, and report generation for sampled regime.normal factor weights.

label: Factor-weight Dirichlet Neighbourhood (tight)
detail: Requirement-style reruns built from full snapshot refresh, backtest, analysis, and report generation for sampled regime.normal factor weights.

label: Rolling Out-of-Sample (24P IS / 1P OOS)
detail: Built directly from monthly return records of the quarterly-rebalanced strategy using rolling 24-period estimation windows and chained 1-period OOS evaluation.

label: Monte Carlo Path Simulation from Empirical Mean/Covariance
detail: Uses multivariate normal simulation fitted to realized monthly strategy and benchmark returns from the quarterly-rebalanced run.
